programme.desc: Kai confronts his dad for aiding the Hands of Time, only to discover that his parents are actually Acronix and Krux's captives.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo consigue una ocupación donde se siente como pez en el agua, mientras que Peluzín entra en un proyecto experimental que le traerá muchos problemas a todos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar encuentra por fin el amor de manera inesperada mientras que el Pasita, triste por las limitaciones de su edad avanzada consigue la receta para la eterna juventud.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Frustrado por su trabajo, Gaspar busca apoyo en el Abuelo y el Noruego y termina accidentado. Mientras, gracias a la medicina experimental, Peluzín se convierte en el Dr Lambretón.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pelu el Payaso le pide a Jony que sea su nuevo ayudante e inician una gira espectacular que da muchos frutos. Mientras tanto, el Noruego descubre su afición por los tatuajes.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín adquiere una nueva mascota que revolucionará el vecindario. En tanto el Noruego y Gaspar intentan ayudar a el Lentejas a superar sus extrañas inclinaciones sexuales.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo y el Noruego buscan nuevos horizontes a través de la creación de una fundación, mientras Peluzín cae en la cuenta de su soledad y sale a buscar amigos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego aprende inglés y se prepara para vivir el sueño americano. En tanto, el Abuelo llega a un reencuentro con sus ex-compañeros de colegio y descubre una verdad sepultada por el tiempo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín tiene éxito con un nuevo método de protesta, mientras El Noruego y Jony dan sus primeros pasos en la "cossa nostra"

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La Familia abre un grupo de WhatsApp para estar más conectados pero este se sale de control, mientras que Peluzín aprrovecha una noticia de un asesinato para sacarle dinero a Pitipú.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El calentamiento global trae consigo una mueva amenaza para la ciudad, mientras que Irma y Peluzín emprenden en un nuevo negocio, reclutando a varios amigos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego milagrosamente logra que le den un crédito bancario, mientras que Peluzín se aprovecha de una muerte reciente dentro del edificio para su beneficio económico.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego emprende en un nuevo negocio con pulgas, mientras que el Abuelo y Jonathan son tomados como rehenes por unos crimínales en un asalto al banco.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Jonathan y Gaspar buscan darle una lección al Abuelo en en Día del Padre, mientras que el Noruego se siente que no es valorado por Olaf y junto con Peluzín deciden tomar cartas en el asunto.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se topa un con Genio quien le conceda varios deseos, mientras que el Noruego decide lanzarle una fiesta sorpresa de cumpleaños a Olaf para que recupere su infancia perdida.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La compañía donde trabaja Gaspar atraviesa un recorte de personal pero el es de los pocos afortunados que se salva y es mandado a una capacitación a Estados Unidos, mientras que Peluzín toma el papel de Gaspar en México.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar atraviesa una crisis en su periodo de entrenamiento en Estados Unidos, mientras que el resto de la familia decide alcanzar a Gaspar

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se enamora de la estatua de cera de Ivanka Trump y toda la familia decide hacer un viaje y atravesar todo el país en auto hasta Nueva York.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego decide ir a NY a conocer a la verdadera Ivanka pero en el camino el grupo se separa de el Abuelo y Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego sigue con su plan de casarse con la Ivanka de cera, mientras que el Abuelo y Peluzín afianzan su relación después de su gran viaje

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La familia va a Washington a pedir la mano de Ivanka con un resultado inesperado, mientras que Johnny busca deshacer la relación enfermiza entre el Abuelo y Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego recibe la sorpresa que después de una muchos años de crímenes su papá le deja un jugoso botín como herencia, mientras que Jonathan y Ortega buscan a un adulto que los lleve a la premier de la película del momento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se muda a un lujoso departamento y se dedica a buscar a un nuevo roommate, mientras que El Abuelo y Jonathan se pelean por quedarse con el cuarto una vez que el Noruego dejo el departamento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Jonathan es admitido a una reconocida escuela privada y Gaspar al no poder cubrir los gastos decide aventurarse con Peluzín en unos negocios turbios, mientras el Noruego busca consejos por parte de su familia porque no esta contento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El abuelo se ahoga con un hueso de pollo y LFDB se ve forzada a buscar ayuda de emergencia, mientras que el Noruego y Peluzín deciden ingresar a un gimnasio y competir por los resultados.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se involucra sentimentalmente con la nueva roommate del Noruego, la cual esconde un oscuro secreto, mientras tanto Peluzín y Jony buscan lanzar a Olaf al estrellato.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Tenta-Culo celebra su aniversario y hace una gran fiesta donde invita a todos, desafortunadamente durante el evento sucede un crimen y nadie puede salir hasta encontrar al responsable.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar y el Abuelo se topan con una familia muy peculiar, situación que el Abuelo busca aprovechar, mientras que Peluzín y Pitipu buscan curar a Don Sebas de una extraña adicción.

programme.title: Wu-Tang Clan: Of Mics & Men

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP: La manada más salvaje

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP: De la broma a la guerra
programme.desc: La tablet manda a Ana e Isaac a una cita romántica y Leslie tambalea. La sala tornado abre sus puertas y sus vientos traen muchas dudas. Lizbeth y Diana planean una broma que no termina nada bien. La llegada del próximo ex podría ser devastadora.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP: El tiburón tiene colmillo
programme.desc: Los nuevos ex abren las puertas a más problemas. Diana se pone malacopa y amarga la fiesta más dulce. Un tiburón de dos patas visita la villa y lo que parecía un chiste termina siendo una verdadera amenaza. La primera Love Suite es para...

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP: Shots con sentimiento

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP: No soportas, ¿verdad?
programme.desc: Lalo viene a terminar los pendientes con Leslie y a Isaac le toca atacarse. Lizbeth explota contra Isaac y Rufas. Yurgenis se libera en un catamarán, sin la sombra de Brandon. El nuevo ex llega muy salsa, pero de la que no pica.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP: El jaque mate
programme.desc: Ana saborea el plato de la venganza, mientras que Leslie se limpia las lágrimas con su orgullo. Un divertido día de playa se convierte en una pesadilla. La llegada del nuevo ex cambia el juego y La Divaza tira los dados cuando no es su turno.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP: Veo, veo y no veo claro

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP: Aquí se arma la de cantina

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP: Los demonios bailan en la villa

programme.desc: Posing as a bag woman for a crooked politician, Casey unknowingly carries an attached case locked to her wrist filled with both money and a bomb set to explode upon opening.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Gangsters running a loan-shark racket in Hawaii short-circuit the IMF team's investigation when they capture Willy and feed him gigantic doses of truth serum.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Modern Marvels

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Through rain, snow, heat, or gloom of night, we expect postmen to deliver the mail; the U.S. Post Office handles over 603-million pieces of mail daily; yet it represents only 43% of the world's total mail volume.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Freight trains transport 1.8 billion tons annually as America's economic lifeblood, carrying crops, electronics, cars, chemicals, and coal; explore Union Pacific's Bailey yard, the world's greatest freight system, from mining tramway origins.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: In less than a century, the world went from dirt tracks to highways, from propeller planes to space travel, from sailboats to supertankers; in the process, a glut of traffic was created on roadways, railways, airways, and seaways.

programme.title: Modern Marvels

programme.title: Modern Marvels

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: The Massachusetts Central Artery/Tunnel Project, a.k.a. The Big Dig, is an impressive municipal construction project in U.S.; its objective to replace Boston's decaying highway infrastructure with 160 new highway miles.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Giant robots work factory floors and outer space; floating fortresses house 6,000 military personnel with length matching Empire State Building's height; diesel engines produce 108,000 horsepower in audacious engineering feats worldwide.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: A study of the discoveries, inventions and technological advances that have helped us understand and predict weather; from observations made by early humans, to Doppler radar and satellite imaging, we'll see how man has tried to harness weather.

programme.title: Modern Marvels

programme.title: Modern Marvels

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Tommy decide que le gustaría andar desnudo como su perro, Firulais. Angélica forma un club secreto y hace que los bebés compitan para entrar en el club.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Cuando Chas reemplaza la cuna de Carlitos por una cama de nene grande, Angélica le dice a Carlitos que debajo de la cama hay un monstruo. Chas gana la lotería, por lo que él y Carlitos se vuelven millonarios.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Carlota lleva a Tommy y Angélica al trabajo. Ellos hacen un desastre y casi arruinan un contrato. Un ángel de la guarda, le muestra a Carlitos como hubiera sido la vida de su familia si él nunca hubiera nacido.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Carlitos tiene un sueño muy real, y los bebes intentan convencerlo de que no está soñando. Cansada de ser dejada de lado en la casa de Phil y Lil, Angelica dice que ella sabe quien de los mellizos es el favorito y cuál el olvidado.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Carlitos está cansado de que la gente bromee con su pelo colorado, y le pide a Tommy que se lo tiña negro con la tintura del Abuelo. Cuando Firulais se pierde, Hugo trata de reemplazarlo con una serie nueva de juguetes.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Angélica convence a los bebés de que Carlitos es un extraterrestre. Después de que Chas le habla a Carlitos sobre los gérmenes, Carlitos tiene temor de tocar cosas por miedo a tener contacto con gérmenes.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Carlota anuncia que está embarazada, y Angélica teme ser olvidada una vez que nazca el bebé. Los Rugrats se imaginan que son héroes para recuperar los muñecos de su programa de televisión favorito que Angélica les quitó.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Cansados del maltrato de Angélica, los Rugrats van a jugar con otro niño en el parque llamado Josh, quien termina siendo peor que Angélica. Angélica decide denunciar a sus padres cuando ellos tratan de hacerle comer brócoli.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los Rugrats van a la casa de Boris y Minka para pasar las Pascuas y, por accidente, se quedan todos encerrados en el ático. Para pasar el tiempo, Boris les cuenta a los bebés la historia de Moisés.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Cuando Hugo rompe el televisor, los Rugrats usan una caja vacía para crear sus propios programas. Angélica les dice a los bebés que el cielo se está cayendo y que está llegando el fin del mundo.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Carlitos adopta una mascota, el insecto Melville. Cuando Melville muere, a Carlitos le cuesta mucho aceptarlo y pasa por todos los procesos del duelo. Angélica les pide a los Rugrats que la mantengan alejada de las galletas.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Carlitos se enamora de una nueva niña, Megan, y demuestran su cariño molestándose. Los Rugrats están felices de que Angélica se va a mudar lejos, hasta que Tommy comienza a recordar el primer día que todos se conocieron.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: El comportamiento de Firulais se vuelve un poco extraño cuando adopta unos gatitos y los esconde en su casa. / Carlitos se contagia de varicela, y Angélica les dice a los bebés que es una enfermedad que te convierte en pollo.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Mientras escuchan un programa de radio con el Abuelo, los Rugrats juegan a ser detectives y se preponen resolver un misterio. / Angélica convence a los Rugrats de que puede predecir el futuro, y les pide juguetes y galletas como pago.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Hugo y Julio compiten entre sí grabando los momentos más divertidos de sus hijos para ganar un concurso de un programa de televisión. / Los Rugrats compiten en contra de los bebés McNulty para salvar la medalla de oro de Angélica.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales

programme.desc: Jimbei arrives on the scene and works to free Luffy and Nami! Meanwhile Sanji confronts his sister with the awful truth of Pudding, and she confides in him the powerful secret of their mother's undying love!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Brook finds himself totally at the whim of Big Mom, and comes face to face with her brutal love! Meanwhile, Pedro reveals his explosive plan to create a distraction!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Chopper and Carrot use the mirror dimension to get in touch with Nami and Jimbei! Luffy makes it through more obstacles to learn that he just missed Sanji! Meanwhile, Sanji wonders alone about the best course of action.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Brook hears Big Mom's plan firsthand as she shares her intentions with Pudding in front of him! Meanwhile, Big Mom's agents believe most of the Straw Hats to be under control, but doubt besets Montd'Or.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami and the others finally find Brook in the mirror dimension - but he's in the most inopportune of places! Can they challenge the sleeping Mama and rescue their friend? Meanwhile, Luffy is waylaid on his way back to the rendezvous!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy puts up a valiant fight in order to keep his word to Sanji! But will he be able to last until Sanji arrives at the rendezvous? Meanwhile, Jimbei shares the awful truth about the wedding with the other Straw Hats.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji and Luffy meet finally - and while he is happy to feed Luffy to replenish his energy, Sanji's explanation of what actions he must take baffles Luffy! The crucial decision, to turn his back on his friends or his family, tears Sanji apart!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The newly reunited Luffy and Sanji hear from the rest of the Straw Hats in the mirror dimension! Then, Jimbei starts telling them about Capone "Gang" Bege and proposes a shocking plan to take down Big Mom!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats put Jimbei's plan into action and approach Bege with the possibility of an alliance. But before they are granted an audience, they must make themselves presentable!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The proposed alliance between the Straw Hats and Bege unfolds! A gaseous blast from the past, Gastino, a member of Bege's team, reveals the secret weapon that the team plans to use against the Emperor!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Now, the assassination plan of Big Mom is all set and everyone starts preparing for the Tea Party. Montd'Or finds one of his crewmates, Bobbin the Disposer, dead, and suspects Sanji and Luffy of the crime.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The day has arrived! Guests from the criminal underground pour in droves, but some have their own agendas to settle! Big Mom's sons, however, stand in their way and show them what they've got! Meanwhile, Luffy is preparing for his own plan!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Final preparations abound on all sides and multiple plots start to come together! But can Sanji keep his nerve and go through with the plan? Or will Pudding's beauty prove too enchanting?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: All plans go into action as the moment of the wedding arrives - but as the veil is lifted on Pudding's grotesque face, all hell breaks loose and unexpected circumstances mean chaos at the altar! Meanwhile, Luffy charges in, adding to the mayhem!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The plan is launched! Big Mom falls to pieces as the wedding - and the wedding cake - are destroyed and a slew of Luffys are wreaking havoc around the site. But just when Luffy gets in trouble, Jimbei confronts Big Mom bravely!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The plan is in full swing however - Big Mom is pushed past the edge of sanity and can't even bring herself to act. Meanwhile, her children make a move against Germa and Pudding takes up her original aim of killing Sanji!

programme.desc: Jotaro and crew acquire the help of Iggy but are ambushed by a water Stand. With Kakyoin injured, Avdol tries out a stratagem which the unseen enemy quickly sees through. Meanwhile, Iggy is napping.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Khnum's Zenyatta and Thoth's Mondatta
programme.desc: After the battle with N'doul, Kakyoin and Avdol are badly hurt, so the group heads for a hospital in Aswan. Unfortunately, dangerous enemies could be all around them even there.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Anubis, Part 1
programme.desc: A young man named Chaka finds a mysterious sword on the beach. Though other men try, Chaka is the only one who can draw it. The sword claims Chaka as its master and sends the youth in pursuit of Jotaro and his friends with deadly intent.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Anubis, Part 2
programme.desc: Having defeated the "Anubis" Stand user Chaka, Polnareff pays a visit to a barber. But when the barber starts attacking him with Chaka's sword, the Frenchman realizes the sword itself is the Stand user.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Bast's Mariah, Part 1
programme.desc: On the way to Luxor, Joseph notices an electrical outlet set in a rock. Fascinated by the rare sight, Joseph goes in for a closer look and gets shocked. Though he seems fine afterward, soon all manner of small accidents begin to occur around him.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Bast's Mariah, Part 2
programme.desc: Due to the powers of an enemy Stand, Joseph's body becomes magnetized. While chasing after the woman he suspects is the Stand user, Joseph learns that Avdol has also become magnetized from touching a different electrical outlet.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Set's Alessi, Part 1
programme.desc: With Joseph and Avdol busy fighting Mariah, Jotaro and Polnareff get concerned about why they haven't shown up yet. As the two search Luxor, Polnareff senses someone following them and confronts the man.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Set's Alessi, Part 2
programme.desc: The power of Alessi's Stand "Set" has turned Polnareff back into a child, leaving him confused and alone. A passerby named Marena takes the boy into her home to help him, but they are followed by Alessi and his terrible powers.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: D'Arby the Gambler, Part 1
programme.desc: After a long journey, Jotaro and his friends finally reach Cairo. They begin asking about the location of DIO's palace and find one man who says he has information, but will only answer if the group can beat him in a game.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: D'Arby the Gambler, Part 2
programme.desc: After losing to D'Arby, Joseph and Polnareff have their souls taken. In order to have their souls returned, Jotaro shows off Star Platinum's powers before beginning a match with D'Arby, warning him that cheating won't work.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Hol Horse and Mondatta, Part 1
programme.desc: Hol Horse arrives at Cairo in order to pursue Jotaro and the others. He has joined forces with another partner and is after the lives of Jotaro and crew once more. What's more, his new partner is none other than Mondatta.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Hol Horse and Mondatta, Part 2
programme.desc: Following Mondatta's prediction, Hol Horse sticks his fingers into Polnareff's nose, but he doesn't know what to do from there. Making matters worse, Jotaro and the others show up in search of Polnareff, forcing Hol Horse into a tough spot.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: The Guardian of Hell, Pet Shop, Part 1
programme.desc: Jotaro and his friends continue to search for DIO's mansion in Cairo. Following Avdol's advice, they have a beggar look for the mansion and wait. Meanwhile, Iggy, wandering the city alone, is confronted by two large dogs.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: The Guardian of Hell, Pet Shop, Part 2
programme.desc: Iggy ends up in a battle to the death in the sewers against Pet Shop, the falcon that guards DIO's mansion. Despite being injured, Iggy runs to the river in an attempt to escape, but he may have underestimated Pet Shop's abilities.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: D'Arby the Player, Part 1
programme.desc: Though purchased dearly with Iggy's injury, Jotaro and his group finally have the location of DIO's palace. Waiting for them where they find the butler, Darby Younger, brother of the gambler they previously defeated.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: D'Arby the Player, Part 2
programme.desc: The battle for souls with D'Arby continues. Kakyoin challenges D'Arby to a racing game but ends up losing both the race and his soul. Before Joseph really has time to react, Jotaro picks the next game.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: The Miasma of the Void, Cool Ice, Part 1
programme.desc: The baseball game with D'Arby continues within DIO's mansion. For some reason, Jotaro starts telling D'Arby what pitches he'll be throwing. D'Arby finds Jotaro's actions strange, but still believes he has the upper hand because of his Stand's abilities.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: The Miasma of the Void, Cool Ice, Part 2
programme.desc: After a long, hard journey, the group is suddenly faced with saying goodbye to a friend. Polnareff can't control his emotions and starts brandishing his sword toward an unseen enemy with very little success.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: The Miasma of the Void, Cool Ice, Part 3
programme.desc: Polnareff is pushed to his limits by Cool Ice's merciless attacks. As he awaits death, the dying Iggy manages to save him at the last minute. Polnareff then stabs Cool Ice in the head. Despite showing resilience to the attacks so far.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: DIO's World, Part 1
programme.desc: Polnareff finally comes face-to-face with DIO. Despite Polnareff's hostility, DIO offers to forgive him and allow the Frenchman to join his side again. Polnareff refuses, but for some reason, he cannot get any closer to DIO.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: DIO's World, Part 2
programme.desc: As night falls, the battle expands to encompass the whole city of Cairo. Amidst the melee, Kakyoin says he has a way to figure out DIO's Stand ability.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: DIO's World, Part 3
programme.desc: Thanks to Kakyoin, Joseph is able to figure out that DIO's Stand, "The World," has the power to stop time, but is quickly defeated by DIO. Jotaro then attacks The World with Star Platinum but is no match for DIO's power.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Jotaro Kujo! Meets Josuke Higashikata
programme.desc: In April 1999, Jotaro Kujo travels to a town in Japan called Morioh to find a young man named Josuke Higashikata, the secret love child of his grandfather, Joseph Joestar. Upon finding him, Jotaro is surprised to learn that Josuke also possesses a Stand.

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Un Entrenador joven y poco experimentado asustó a su propio Farfetch'd. Nuestros héroes están felices de ayudarlo, pero tendrán que hallarlo antes que el Equipo Rocket.

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: En un festival anual de intercambio Pokémon, un joven Entrenador busca un buen cambio por su Wobbuffet. El trío del Equipo Rocket también busca oportunidades, pero ambos grupos de Entrenadores obtienen más de lo que pidieron.

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Una inesperada competencia de apaga incendios Pokémon reúne a nuestros héroes con algunos viejos amigos, el escuadrón Squirtle! pero necesitan desesperadamente a un líder, así que Ash y Squirtle se reintegran a sus filas.

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentran con una guardería para Wooper y una emergencia requiere del maestro, nuestros héroes van al rescate. Pero, como siempre, el Equipo Rocket está a la vuelta de la esquina, y no trama nada bueno…

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: En su camino hacia ciudad Caña Dorada, nuestros héroes se ven obligados a atravesar un túnel resguardado por un furioso Onix. Para hacer las cosas más difíciles, el equipo Rocket, Snubbull y Jigglypuff llegan de visita…

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Siguiendo una serie de misteriosos robos, nuestros héroes descubren a unos Houndour luchando por sobrevivir en la naturaleza. Para ayudar a estos Pokémon ladrones a reformarse, Ash y sus amigos tendrán que ganarse su confianza.

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: La rivalidad entre Ash y Misty se reaviva cuando ambos tratan de capturar a Totodile a la vez. Como no saben cuál Pokébola lo capturó, tendrán una batalla para decidir quién será el nuevo Entrenador de Totodile.

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Cuando Ash oye de un entrenador virtualmente invencible, quiere ir a retarlo. Pero el Vulpix de Brock y el Cyndaquil de Ash reciben una paliza de su Skarmory, ¡a pesar de su ventaja de tipo! ¿Cómo logrará Ash derrotarlo?

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: El Totodile de Ash se enamora de un Azumarill, que es la artista estrella de un circo Pokémon. Cuando el Equipo Rocket llega a robar el espectáculo, el corazón de Azumarill no será la única cosa que Totodile deba ganar.

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Ash tiene la vista puesta en un raro Noctowl de un color inusual, pero este astuto Pokémon usa repetidamente Hipnosis para engañarlo. ¿Podrá Ash capturar a este Noctowl dormilón?

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Un ataque sorpresa de un grupo de Ursaring hace que nuestros héroes y el Equipo Rocket busquen refugio. En el caos, los grupos se separan, y las poco entusiasmadas parejas tienen que trabajar juntas. Pero, ¿por cuánto tiempo?

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Tras una advertencia en el bosque sobre un travieso Pokémon tipo Fantasma, nuestros héroes llegan a un pueblo donde todos usan tipos Psíquico para repelerlos. Pronto llegan temibles noticias: ¡un Gengar gigante anda suelto!

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Una repentina moda en la adivinación Pokémon resulta ser un plan para robar a los Pokémon de los Entrenadores locales. Pero esta vez Jessie, James y Meowth no son los responsables. ¿Quiénes son estos villanos?

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: ¡Ash Ketchum, un niño de diez años de Pueblo Paleta, finalmente tiene la edad para recibir a su primer Pokémon! Sin embargo, se queda dormido y el único Pokémon restante en el laboratorio del profesor Oak es un terco Pikachu.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Ash corre hacia Ciudad Viridian con su herido Pikachu, ahí se encuentra con Jessie, James, y Meowth del Equipo Rocket, así como con Misty, quien está molesta porque Ash descompuso su bicicleta.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: ¡Ash descubre y atrapa a su primer Pokémon! Aunque está emocionada, Misty siente repugnancia por su nuevo amigo Pokémon tipo insecto.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: ¡Un furioso enjambre de Beedrill ataca a Ash y a Samurái a la mitad de un duelo de Metapod! Ash escapa, dejando atrás a su Metapod, quien está molesto con él por abandonarlo.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Ash desafía al líder de gimnasio de Ciudad Plateada, Brock, pero ni siquiera Pikachu tiene oportunidad contra los Pokémon tipo roca de Brock. Con la ayuda del misterioso Flint, Ash entrenará duro antes de la revancha.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Un científico guía a Ash y a sus a amigos a las profundidades de Mr. Moon para encontrar la famosa piedra lunar, la cual se dice tiene el poder de incrementar el poder de los Pokémon.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Ash busca la Medalla Cascada en Ciudad Celeste, pero por alguna razón, Misty no quiere acompañarlo.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Luego de ganar su segunda medalla, Ash parte triunfal hacia Ciudad Carmín. En el camino escucha acerca de AJ, un entrenador a punto de conseguir 100 victorias seguidas. ¡Lleno de confianza, Ash reta a este temible entrenador!

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Ash conoce a algunos estudiantes, quienes molestan a su compañero Joe. Joe insiste en que se necesita un trato duro para que él sea lo suficientemente fuerte para graduarse. Ash no está de acuerdo.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Completamente perdidos, nuestros héroes llegan a un pueblo que no aparece en su mapa. Este tranquilo lugar está habitado por Pokémon que han sido heridos en batalla o abandonados por sus entrenadores.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Conforme nuestros héroes se acercan a Ciudad Carmín, se encuentran con un Charmander herido, sentado sobre una piedra en el paso de una montaña. Más tarde descubren por qué está esperando ahí.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Ash y sus amigos caminan por un sendero y caen en un hoyo cavado por un grupo de traviesos Squirtle. ¿Por qué el Escuadrón Squirtle es una amenaza para la gente del lugar?

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: El grupo conoce a Bill, un investigador Pokémon que está esperando en su faro la llegada de un Pokémon único en su tipo, nunca antes visto por los humanos. ¿Acaso existirá un Pokémon así?

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Ansioso por ganar una medalla, Ash reta al Lt. Surge. Pikachu entra sin ganas a la batalla, donde descubre que su oponente es un Raichu, un feroz Pokémon con un tremendo poder eléctrico, ¡y la forma evolucionada de Pikachu!

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Ash y sus amigos abordan el crucero St. Anne gracias a los boletos proporcionados por Jessie y James disfrazados. Su más reciente plan es atraer entrenadores Pokémon hacia el barco para robar sus Pokémon.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Una tormenta obliga a todos, excepto al Equipo Rocket y a nuestros héroes, a abandonar el zozobrante St. Anne. Ash, Brock y Misty deben hacer equipo con sus antiguos enemigos para sobrevivir esta bochornosa situación.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Mientras nuestros héroes y el Equipo Rocket sobreviven contra toda posibilidad al hundimiento del St. Anne, se ven arrastrados a otra peligrosa situación cuando son atacados por el Pokémon Gyarados.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!

programme.title: RiffTrax: Silent Rage
programme.desc: You'll laugh, you'll cry, and you probably won't be so silent about the great deal of rage you'll feel. This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with comedic commentary by Mike, Kevin, and Bill from MST3K.

programme.title: Kill Or Be Killed
programme.desc: Kill or Be Killed is a cornucopia of wonders, specifically South African martial arts wonders. It's got a long-haired karate hero and a whacked-out plot. Join Mike, Kevin & Bill as they riff or be killed!

programme.title: RiffTrax: Kill and Kill Again
programme.desc: It’s your standard South African martial arts extravaganza based around root vegetable gasoline. You’re gonna love it, and love it again, with Mike, Kevin and Bill! This feature is a parody and contains the original movie.

programme.title: RiffTrax: Omega Cop
programme.desc: The surest way to tell you're in for a really crappy movie, (other than “Written and directed by James Nguyen”) is the word Cop appearing in the movie title.

programme.title: RiffTrax: Breaker Breaker
programme.desc: Breaker Breaker is a Chuck Norris filled tale of moonshine, hillbillies, and sweet airbrushed eagles on the side of vans! This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with comedic commentary by Mike, Kevin and Bill from MST3K.

programme.title: RiffTrax: Universal Soldier II: Brothers in Arms
programme.desc: Get your undead robot on with Universal Soldier II: Brothers in Arms! This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with a comedic commentary by Mike, Kevin, and Bill from MST3K.

programme.title: RiffTrax: Universal Soldier III: Unfinished Business
programme.desc: Things explode! Robots wear Google Glass! Business… gets finished?? This feature is a parody with the original movie & funny commentary with Mike, Kevin & Bill of MST3K.

programme.title: RiffTrax: Oblivion
programme.desc: It's Cowboys & Aliens in the Wild Wild West! How could a sci-fi western about either of those things possibly be bad?

programme.title: RiffTrax: Oblivion 2: Backlash
programme.desc: Oblivion 2: Backlash! No, it's not just a compilation of all the backlash the first Oblivion received, it's the title of a direct-to-video sequel to Oblivion. What did we do to deserve this? No, seriously, what did we do to deserve this.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.desc: Spock hijacks the Enterprise to return an injured Captain Pike to Talos IV.

programme.desc: Kirk is one of the last survivors who can identify a mass killer, who lurks among a Shakespearean troupe aboard the Enterprise.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: After an alien race implants false memories of a twenty-year prison sentence into O'Brien's brain, he has trouble readjusting to station life.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine

programme.desc: Bashir tries to save a Gamma Quadrant society afflicted with an incurable, terminal disease by the Jem'Hadar.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: A severely injured crewmember's life hangs in the balance as Sisko battles for control of a crashed Jem'Hadar warship.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Picard learns that he has a son, and that the young man has been targeted for murder by an old enemy in search of revenge.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The lives of the Enterprise crew are endangered when the ship suddenly develops its own intelligence.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ro Laren is forced to choose between her loyalty to Picard and her hatred toward Cardassia when she accepts an assignment to infiltrate the Maquis.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Picard finds himself travelling between the past, present, and future while attempting to prevent the destruction of humanity... by his own actions.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Enterprise is carrying an eminent scientist, Dr. Paul Stubbs, to the site of a binary star where they are expecting a massive stellar explosion to occur in a few hours.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After a century of silence, the Enterprise receives a message from the Sheliac system informing them that they have discovered a human colony on a world in their sector.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Enterprise responds to a distress call from Rana IV, a Federation colony that is under attack from an unknown alien ship.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: A startling surprise awaits the crew of the Enterprise when a mission costs the life of a crew member, who left her son behind.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: While the Enterprise hosts negotiations for control of a stable wormhole, Troi forms a personal relationship with an opposing negotiator, unaware of his true being.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Enterprise pursues a race of "gatherers" who continue to raid Federation outposts, unaware of the dangers lurking among them.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: When Seven is threatened by assimilation into the Collective, Janeway launches an all-out mission to rescue her.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: As crewmembers begin dying, they make a startling discovery about their true identities.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Voyager's future depends on Seven's success in preventing the past.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: An alien weapon that possesses artificial intelligence begins to terrorize the crew.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: In the hopes of finding something beneficial, the crew follows an energy signature that leads them to a mysterious sea of lifeless ships. With no visible signs of danger, the crew set off to take a closer look. But things may not be what they seem.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Captain Carter unwillingly becomes the host to a dying Tok'ra, a member of the resistance whose noble goal is to overthrow the evil Goa'uld empire. Now she sees through the Tok'ra's eyes, but can her visions help the SG-1 team save the Tok'ra?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: The Tok'ra are desperate for hosts so they can continue fighting the Goa'uld. Carter's father, who is dying of cancer, has nothing to lose by volunteering his body. But will he die during the transference...or does fate have something else in store?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-11 vanishes while negotiating the mining rights on a planet inhabited by a tribe known as the Salish. Can the SG-1 team find their lost colleagues without angering the planet's mystical spirits...or will they become their next victims?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: A climate-controlling touchstone is stolen from planet Madrona, causing the weather to rapidly deteriorate. And when the SG-1 team is accused of the theft, O'Neill must pursue the real thief and rescue the missing stone before Madrona perishes.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: While studying alien wall inscriptions on another planet, O'Neill peers into a viewer that unleashes ancient knowledge into his mind like computer virus. Can the SG-1 team reverse the process before his mind is completely reconfigured.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: A black hole swallows the SG-10 team, and O'Neill is sent on a rescue mission. As the hole's pull grows stronger, it draws the Stargate toward it and soon threatens to destroy Earth. Will O'Neill find a way to stop this super-destructive force?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Jackson's body is swapped with that of an old Goa'uld enemy. As Jackson lies dying in the alien's ancient body, O'Neill and Teal'c accidentally switch forms too, and unless the alien is captured, all will be trapped in their new bodies forever!

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1's arch-enemy Apophis is dying and seeks sanctuary with O'Neill. But what he really wants is a new host in exchange for his knowledge of the Goa'uld. Will O'Neill grant his request or send him back to the Goa'uld to face his fate?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: On a routine recon mission, the SG-1 team discovers a new, friendly life form. But the encounter turns deadly for the new race because of a virus SG-1 inadvertently introduces. Can SG-1 develop a vaccine before this plague eradicates a civilization?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: A boy mysteriously appears at SGC and pleas for help, claiming the Goa'uld are chasing him to find a race of invisible beings. But the SG-1 team doesn't know that the invisible aliens plan to destroy humanity…and their invasion has already begun!

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: A solar flare sends the SG-1 team back to 1969, where the U.S. military suspects the team of espionage. O'Neill and his team escape with two Woodstock-bound kids, desperate to find the Stargate before they're stuck in the psychedelic past forever.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: O'Neill awakens, seemingly from a 79-year cryogenic sleep, to find that his team is long dead. He soon discovers that it's all a setup and he is actually a prisoner of the Goa'uld, who intend to learn all his secrets…and then destroy him!

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: The team prepares for the worst as board a Wraith hive ship over Atlantis. They're surprised to find the Wraith crew in stasis when a malfunction on the hive ship releases the remaining crew… who have been cannibalizing one another for food.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: After Pearl Harbor, the Terminal Islanders are evicted from their homes and must find shelter elsewhere. While Henry, separated from his family, faces injustice at the hands of the government, Chester engages in a paranoid search for answers.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: As the Terminal Islanders adjust to their new surroundings, Chester tries to provide for his family, while fending off the evil that follows him. Henry reels from the trauma of his imprisonment. Asako sees bad omens. Amy takes up a new job.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: Chester, in search of a better life, is treated with hostility by his fellow Americans. Luz hopes to be accepted by Henry and Asako in their new home as the Japanese American community celebrates Obon, a festival to commemorate the dead.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: The Japanese Americans are forced to undertake a humiliating exercise that divides the community. Chester comes face to face with a man who forces him to question his very nature. Luz, stricken by grief, is forced to make an important choice.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: A story of the past provides insight into the present evil that stalks the Terminal Islanders. Chester returns home to his family. Henry and Asako are faced with a difficult decision.

programme.title: The Terror

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire
programme.desc: A visitor from Joe's past threatens his newfound connection with Cameron. With Donna out of town, the toll of Gordon's work catches up with him.

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire
programme.desc: Scandal rocks Cardiff Electric as the team finalizes preparations for COMDEX. Bosworth makes a sacrifice for the good of the PC program.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: When a simple tune Cherry composes goes viral on the Berryweb, Cherry quickly gets fed up with everyone listening to this song, everywhere, all the time.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: This is the story of 'Rapunzel', but with a twist. Princess Rapunzel (Rainbow Sherbet) has always preferred being called Rap and liked doing things her way.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: As this year's BerryFest Princess, Strawberry must learn to be a leader, and overcome many obstacles, to make sure the festival is a success.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It’s that time of year when the berries are about to burst into bloom – and it looks like this will be a bumper crop!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: The girls' new band is about to go on the road to a concert at Berry Big City. But first they must teach the Berrykins all about their businesses, so the little folk can keep the community running until the girls return.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: When the girls discover that Apple's groove booties can teach the pups to dance, Plum gets an idea for a Doggie Dance Show.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Strawberry's world-traveling cousin Apple Dumplin' stops at Berry Bitty City. What starts as a brief visit becomes a series of comical misadventures.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Orange's store is overflowing with Berrykin Bloom's new line of Berry Bitty Fruits & Veggies. Confident she can tackle any challenge, Orange tries to deal with everything herself.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Lemon and Raspberry hire twins Sweet & Sour to help out in Strawberry's café, so Strawberry will have time to appear in an internet fashion contest.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Plum’s plan to direct a small, simple fairy tale play as a surprise performance for the Baby Berrykins snowballs out of control when she hears of the same play being done on a grand scale in a big city theater.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: When Strawberryland’s one movie theatre goes out of business, Strawberry has an idea to save it: she and her friends can film a movie to show there and attract crowds back to the theatre.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Honey Pie Pony is feeling left out of all the kids’ play. She’s the only one with four legs. There’s no one like her to talk to and share her feelings.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Strawberry's new produce marketplace goes under construction. Strawberry is so grateful to her girlfriends for helping her with a new bedroom atop the marketplace, that she accommodates all their ideas and neglects to include her own!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Strawberry struggles with how to be the berry best hostess when she has the very worst house guests.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: When there's a blackout in Berry Bitty City, Orange discovers she has a fear of what's in the dark: a Galumphalot.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Blueberry overhears Strawberry talking about a wonderful tropical island and believes her friend is going to surprise them all with a much-needed vacation.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Friends from all over the world descend on Strawberryland to take part in the first Great Friendship Festival.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang takes Katara and Sokka to an Earthbender city. The kids cause damage and are brought before a crazy old king, who seems to enjoy messing with the kids' heads.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: The kids come to an Earth Nation town which is occupied by the Fire Nation. But will Katara's attempts to inspire the oppressed people help them or hurt them?

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang, Katara, and Sokka arrive at a town being terrorized by a mysterious force from the spirit world. Aang doesn't know how to help these people, and realizes he has much to learn about being the Avatar.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: During the winter solstice, Aang must reach a Fire Nation temple while dodging Prince Zuko, Commander Zhao, and the Fire Sages who guard it.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: When Katara's desire to master Waterbending gets the best of her, the kids find themselves on the run from pirates.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Our heroes' friendship is tested when they meet Jet, a charismatic teenager leading a band of rebels who are fighting against the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: When Aang and friends come to the rim of a giant canyon, they are asked to help guide two groups of refugees across. Aang quickly learns that this will be no easy task.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: A powerful storm brings up painful memories of the past - and puts everyone in jeopardy in the present.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: When Sokka and Katara get too sick to travel, Aang goes out on his own to find a cure for them. But he is captured by Zhao and held prisoner inside an impenetrable fortress.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang, Katara, and Sokka discover a village of people who are all reliant on a fortuneteller in their everyday lives - but they are so reliant that they are blind to the immanent danger they are all in.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang feels insecure when Katara and Sokka come across something that reminds them of home. Because Aang thinks his friends might leave him, he hides an important message which only leads to trouble.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang attempts to find a Firebending master to teach him while Katara learns that she possesses a special power.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: After hearing rumors about surviving Airbenders, the kids journey to the Northern Air temple to see for themselves. What they find there could spell disaster for all enemies of the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: The kids reach the Northern Water tribe, and Aang and Katara look for a Waterbending Master as Sokka falls for a princess. Meanwhile, Zhao plans an attack and Zuko must find a way to continue his quest for the Avatar.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: The Northern Water Tribe braces itself for an attack by Admiral Zhao’s Fire Navy fleet. In the heat of battle, Aang struggles to defend the city. He wonders if there isn’t a better way to use his Avatar abilities.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Zhao’s invasion breaks through the outer wall of the Northern Water Tribe’s defenses, and he reveals a sinister plan. Aang goes to the spirit world for help – but will he return in time to stop Zhao and prevent the destruction of the Water Tribe?

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang and the group meet an Earth Kingdom general who wants to use Aang's powerful “Avatar State” as a weapon to defeat the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: On their way to Omashu, the kids become lost in the treacherous "Cave of Two Lovers."

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang enters Omashu so he can learn Earthbending from King Bumi, but the city is in the hands of the Fire Nation!

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: When the kids end up in a mysterious and strange swamp, their fears are exposed. And Aang learns about being "connected to the Earth" from an unlikely teacher.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang must clear up a wave of anti-Avatar sentiment and atone for something he did in the past.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang discovers a possible Earthbending mentor at an underground tournament.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Traveling without Uncle now, Zuko wanders alone into an Earth Kingdom town, where he bonds with a local boy. Meanwhile, Zuko is haunted by memories of his own youth.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: As the kids are pursued relentlessly by a mysterious machine, their exhaustion puts them at each other's throats.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: When Aang struggles with a block while trying to learn Earthbending from Toph, he wonders if the problem is with him or his teacher.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang searches for Appa, while Katara struggles to keep everyone together so they can survive in the vast desert.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: When the kids are prevented from taking the "easy way" into Ba Sing Se, they must escort a family of refugees there the hard way, through the deadly Serpent's Pass.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang discovers a colossal Fire Nation invention heading for Ba Sing Se, and the kids must stop it before it destroys the great wall that protects the city from invasion.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: The Sparta police look into the murder of a wealthy invalid whose philandering husband is having an affair with a local beautician. All the evidence points to the beautician as the prime suspect, but she soon finds her own life is in danger.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Jenny Sawyer, a victim of domestic abuse, is fearful of her husband, Wesley, but she constantly covers up for him and refuses help. When Wesley is murdered outside a local tavern, the police wonder if Jenny may have taken matters into her own hands.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Odessa Robbins is a civil rights hero in Sparta, and the town is planning a celebration of her life. Gillespie’s worries about old racial tensions resurfacing are sadly justified when the festivities are disrupted, putting Odessa’s life in danger.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: A series of suspicious truck accidents on an old country road lead the Sparta police to a local drug ring. Gillespie and his team must find the dealer and put an end to the operation. Meanwhile, Virgil and Althea are at odds about taking a vacation.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Rebecca Ballard and her husband Peter own a fancy restaurant in Sparta; however, Rebecca is having a love affair with Brian Moss, who owns a local auto repair shop. They plan to kill Peter for a large life insurance policy, but their plan goes awry.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: The leaders of a money-laundering operation at a bingo hall are captured and put on trial. The accountant is asked to testify against her bosses. Walker and Trivette have to take her to court, but she keeps escaping them for her own agenda.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Alex gets Walker and Trivette assigned to a movie being filmed as technical advisers. While on the set, Walker overhears several stuntmen talking about a train robbery they are planning.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: The homeless are being beaten by a group of teens who film their attack. Walker poses as a homeless man to see if he can catch them in the act.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: A group of men kidnap a wealthy businessman and take others who were standing near. Alex is one of the people kidnapped. While the kidnappers are arranging for ransom, Alex manages to call Walker with information to help him find them.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Men dressed as clowns are robbing banks at gunpoint. During one heist, an ex-partner of Walker's is killed. Walker and Trivette are determined to find the ruthless group. Walker helps the dead ranger's children cope with their loss.

programme.desc: When Stuart's favorite restaurant is about to close, he takes Phil along for one last meal, only to bump into Phil's ex-wife who is now engaged. Holly is baffled by mixed signals from a cute co-worker. Haskell starts an online traffic school

programme.desc: Armando llega al hospital con un balazo en el pecho, mientras Juan y Ruth hacen el último esfuerzo por sobrevivir. Antes de huir, Dínora llama a Norma para decirle que Juan no regresará jamás.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Una caravana de rescate recorre el territorio en medio de la noche, las sospechas de que Dínora es la culpable del secuestro son corroboradas al hallar a Juan y a Ruth en un camino solitario.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: En una fiesta de bienvenida en la hacienda de los Reyes, Juan revela sus temores sobre algo terrible relacionado con Dínora. Fernando no se salva de la furia de las hermanas Elizondo.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Los matones de Armando le cuentan al jefe que Rosario está viviendo con Memo, van a buscarla pero ella escapa. Jimena visita a Ruth, le brinda su apoyo incondicional en momentos tan difíciles.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Dínora está en la hacienda, sus matones secuestran a Juan. Gabriela reflexiona y ahora solo quiere la felicidad de Norma, mientras Sara le confiesa a su madre de quién está enamorada.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Llevan a Juan a la casa de torturas de Dínora, la policía sospecha de ella y de Fernando. Óscar y Franco encuentran el auto de su hermano con manchas de sangre, están muy preocupados.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Juan recibe la visita de Dínora en la cabaña y se le acerca demasiado, él aprovecha para morderle con furia el labio. Fernando sospecha que Rosario se encuentra escondida en casa de Panchita.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Dínora intimida a su prisionero, quiere que la ame a la fuerza, le dice que ella es mucho más mujer que Norma. Gabriela desea que Juan aparezca para que su hija se case y deje de sufrir.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Dínora y su familia van a la hacienda Elizondo, Norma lo toma como una provocación. Los matones le aseguran a su patrona que Juan es un hombre fuerte y difícil, pero ella los amenaza.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Juan le dice a Dínora que está dispuesto a rogar con tal de obtener su libertad, ella no le cree. Hortencia ve a Ruth, piensa que es Libia, corre y da gritos, en el pueblo piensan que enloqueció.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Ruth sueña que Libia le muestra la cabaña donde tienen a Juan, sale a buscar el lugar, los hombres de Dínora la atrapan en el momento en que están cavando una tumba para enterrarlo.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Ruth y Juan toman a Dínora de rehén y huyen, pero son recapturados y llevados a la montaña para matarlos, sus hermanos merodean por los alrededores. Rosario y Armando tienen un duelo a tiros.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama's paintings leave an art critic speechless, so Gomez sends for his friend, Sam Picasso, to teach Grandmama to paint in the abstract. The starving artist ignores Grandmama's and Morticia's work as he eats and paints.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Rockland Cartright III is a beatnik who crashes his motorbike into a tree and recuperates at the Addams house. Each regards the other as an oddity, although the family learns to appreciate certain aspects of Rockland's life.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Mr. Briggs, the postman, is hired by the government to do undercover work in the Addams house. While pretending to be a stamp collector, he investigates rumors that coded radio messages are being sent from the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch's tiny fire-eating mother visits and demands that Lurch's employers wait on her boy hand-and-foot after Lurch leads her to believe that it's his house. Lurch revels in the unexpected attention he gets from Morticia and Gomez.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's electrical output fails abruptly. Should they call a doctor or an electrician to bring Fester back? Morticia prescribes a bowl of porcupine mold, and both she and Gomez agree that long exposure to moon rays would be beneficial.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family would like to vacation on the moon, but the billion-dollar travel cost is slightly prohibitive. Uncle Fester volunteers $21.13 and Morticia, using Gomez's new supercomputer, suggests placing a $2,000 bet on the daily double horse race.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Cousin Itt is advocated as curator of the local zoo. Gomez uses his influence with Park Commissioner Fisk (guest star Alan Reed) to promote Itt for the job, but the zookeepers are convinced the Addamses' cousin should be confined to a cage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama (Blossom Rock) is hauled off to jail for setting up a fortune-telling booth in the Addamses' living room. Gomez (John Astin) volunteers to act as attorney, and the court session becomes a shambles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez (John Astin) loses his memory after hitting his head; he fails to recognize Morticia (Carolyn Jones) and says the house looks like a condemned museum. The Addamses take turns hitting Gomez on the head trying to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Morticia hears the stock market has crashed, she assumes that Gomez has been financially wiped out and rallies the family to help make money. Morticia gives lessons, Lurch and Fester run an escort service, and the kids run a poison drink stand.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While enjoying a moonlight picnic and snail hunt, the Addams Family is mistaken for Martians by uniformed investigators from Mysterious Space Objects Headquarters. In turn, Gomez (John Astin) and the clan regard their inquisitors with suspicion.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: An organ grinder's fugitive monkey leads Fester to believe that he has turned Pugsley into a monkey. Morticia and Gomez treat the monkey as though he were their son, welcoming him to the dinner table and giving him Pugsley's chores.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's favorite charity is having an auction--so Morticia persuades her family to part with things to sell. Donations include Wednesday's headless doll, the old flogging table, a stuffed vulture and Uncle Fester's dynamite.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The Addams Family ignores notices that their house is to be condemned to make way for a freeway. When sudden explosions cannot be traced to any member of the family but, instead, to city workmen, Gomez is forced to consider moving the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's pen pal, Madelyn, is coming to visit. Fester panics, as he has described himself as handsome, heroic and romantic. Gomez and Morticia agree that all Fester needs is a toupee and they help him make several styles.

programme.title: The Addams Family

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: They say that a burden shared is a burden halved, but when partners team up to commit murder, the weight of their guilt remains just as heavy. Investigators must rely on forensic science to capture partners in crime.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A dog can be a dead man's best friend. Dogs have been trained to sniff out corpses, drugs, explosives, and missing persons. They're often the first to find the essential clue that sets an investigation in motion.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: To the astute detective and forensic specialist, the biggest clues often hide in plain sight, and what seems trivial to some is in reality Critical Evidence.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In San Diego, California, a killer has left behind pieces of evidence. Detectives must sort through these small clues to prove murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Killers often attempt to deflect attention away from their crimes by hiding the remains of their victims. Bodies may lay hidden for years before they are discovered.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Forensic scientists find clues written in blood as they investigate the deaths of three women killed by the men who once loved them.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Investigators are always on the cutting edge of new forensic techniques that can help them solve cases more accurately. An experimental “brain fingerprinting” technique has already won the acquittal of a police officer accused of a drug charge.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: They know as much about crime as any crime fighter, or any criminal. They're the crime writers, and through their eyes we see murder most foul.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Fingerprinting: The identification Division of the FBI relies on fingerprints as one of the most effective ways to identify criminals.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Drowning deaths often look like accidents and water can destroy the scant clues the killer may have left behind. Investigators must turn to forensic science to solve cases where the victim is found dead in the water.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Photography has long been a vital tool in homicide investigations. A single image captures enough information to identify a suspect, and to preserve a vital clue long after a witness' memory fades.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: There's never a good reason for murder, but some killers are particularly brutal—choosing their prey at random or with no apparent motive and then cunningly covering their tracks. Even so, telltale clues remain.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Identifying Burned Remains: It's difficult to have a murder investigation without a body, and burning up the victim is a time-honored method of destroying physical evidence.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The Naval Criminal Investigative Service uses forensic science to solve three perplexing murders and fulfill their motto: “To the living we owe respect; to the dead, we owe the truth”.
